mapper.select: SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ROWNUM RNUM, A.* FROM ( SELECT I.*, (SELECT IMG_URL FROM ITEM_IMG IMG WHERE IMG.ITEM_NO = I.ITEM_NO AND ROWNUM = 1) AS THUMBNAIL FROM ITEM I WHERE I.STATUS = 'N' ORDER BY I.ITEM_NO DESC ) A WHERE ROWNUM <= #{offset} + #{limit} ) WHERE RNUM > #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ITEM WHERE STATUS = 'N' AND SYSDATE BETWEEN START_TIME AND END_TIME
mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_ITEM_NO.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO ITEM ( ITEM_NO, ITEM_TITLE, ITEM_CONTENT, ITEM_SIZE, START_PRICE, DIRECT_BUY, BUY_NOW_PRICE, CURRENT_PRICE, END_TIME, ITEM_CD_NO, USER_NO, COUNTRY_NO, STATUS, START_TIME, CREATE_AT ) VALUES ( #{itemNo}, #{itemTitle}, #{itemContent}, #{item_Size}, #{startPrice}, #{directBuy}, #{buyNowPrice}, #{startPrice}, TO_DATE(#{endTime}, 'YYYY-MM-DD"T"HH24:MI'), #{itemCdNo}, #{userNo}, #{countryNo}, 'N', SYSDATE, SYSDATE )
